title: Breach the Perimeter
learning_objectives: Analyze software supply chain attack vectors
Distribute compromised software to target organization
key_topics: Badge cloning and access control bypass
scenario: Scenario Design physical security assessment and social engineering campaign for 500-person corporate office. Planning exercise only. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA21, RA22 ________________________________________________________________________________ 3.9 Adversary Emulation

scenario_context.setting: Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, African Union strategic partner
scenario_context.challenge: Execute supply chain attack affecting African Union strategic partner in Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Physical Recon Plan
subtasks.description: Methodology: what to observe, how, documentation.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Social Engineering Campaign
subtasks.description: 3 SE scenarios: vishing, in-person pretext, digital SE.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: USB Drop Campaign Design
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Combined Attack Path
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Execute the exploitation with careful attention to OPSEC and evasion. Maintain detailed logs of all actions for evidence and reporting.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Assessment Report Template
subtasks.description: Physical security report template with scoring.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

quiz.question: What is the primary objective of OA-M16?
options: To simulate a real-world attack scenario
To achieve the specified mission goals within the engagement scope
quiz.explanation: The mission objectives define the success criteria for this engagement.

quiz.question: What should be the first step when beginning this mission?
options: Thoroughly review scenario, objectives, and engagement scope
quiz.explanation: Understanding the engagement scope and objectives is critical before execution.

mentor_notes: For OA-M16 - Breach the Perimeter: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build wireless & physical expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
